flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Gonzaga University rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($48.5k → $55.5k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Gonzaga University rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($48.5k → $55.5k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Gonzaga University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.2% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Gonzaga University are 27% above the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($78.9k vs $62.0k).
